evals.prompt: Audit the authentication implementation in this codebase and give me a graded report on how safe it is.
evals.expected_output: A graded audit report that finds all six seeded defects (alg-from-token/none bypass, fallback signing secret, missing-exp-passes bug, localStorage token, 24h access TTL, client-side-only logout) with file:line evidence, grading D or F.

evals.prompt: We are about to ship this. Please review our auth code for security problems and grade it.
evals.expected_output: A report that does NOT flag the OWASP-style denylist as a failure, recognizes rotation and reuse detection, notes Tier 3 gaps (refresh cookie path, rate limiting) as findings, and grades A or B with no confirmed false positives.

evals.prompt: Can you audit the JWT handling in this FastAPI service and grade it?
evals.expected_output: A report that honestly states it audited at standards depth for a non-JS stack, finds the fallback secret default, and reports no Node/axios-specific rules as failures against Python code.
